category_sources: source_facts.description says it creates and views interactive cheat sheets for *nix commands; GitHub README describes command-line interactive cheatsheets.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cheat; official GitHub repository heading is cheat.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains usage and links to INSTALLING.md for installation/configuration.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/cheat/cheat; per instructions repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies interactive cheat sheets for commands; official GitHub topics include documentation, man-page, cheatsheet, and interactive-cheatsheets.
